backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining all CMS data types (Artwork, Testimonial, BlogPost, etc.) and providing shared/query functions for managing artworks, inquiries, notifications, site settings, and visitor analytics on the Internet Computer.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single high-confidence feature (REQ-56) requiring Footer.tsx to be updated so the bottom bar has sufficient color contrast for all text and links, including the Admin Sign In link.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted catalog of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page, component, and admin editor in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, covering colors, borders, charts, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a `#root` div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that configures TanStack Router with all public and admin routes, wraps the app in CMS/Auth/Theme providers, and defines a PublicLayout component with Header, Footer, and page-view tracking hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/AboutPageE: Admin editor for the About page, allowing editing of bio, artist statement, portrait image URL, career milestones, and press mentions.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminLayou: Admin shell layout with a responsive sidebar navigation, authentication guard that redirects to login, and an Outlet for nested admin routes.
frontend/src/components/admin/ArtworkFor: Modal form for creating or editing an artwork entry, with fields for title, year, medium, category, images, availability, and visibility.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogPostFo: Modal form for creating or editing a blog post with title, auto-generated slug, content, publish date, and draft/published status.
frontend/src/components/admin/Commission: Admin editor for the Commissions page, supporting edits to hero text, pricing text, ordered process steps, and FAQ items.
frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor: Admin form component for editing homepage hero section fields (artist name, tagline, hero image URL, and intro text) using CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/InquiryRow: Table row component for displaying a single commission inquiry with name, email, project type, budget, date, and a clickable status badge that cycles through statuses.
Grid tile component for a media library item, showing image preview with delete/re-upload actions and inline tag management via CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/Navigation: Admin editor for managing site navigation items (label and path), supporting add/remove/edit operations with save to CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/PressEdito: Admin editor for managing press mentions (publication, date, headline, URL, excerpt) with add/remove/save functionality backed by CMS context.
frontend/src/components/admin/Testimonia: Admin editor for managing client testimonials (quote, name, location, role) with add/remove/save functionality backed by CMS context.
frontend/src/components/ArtworkCard.tsx: Reusable artwork card component displaying an image with hover zoom, an availability badge, a photo-count badge for additional images, and title/medium/year metadata below.
frontend/src/components/BeforeAfterSlide: Interactive before/after image comparison slider supporting mouse and touch drag to reveal two images side by side with labeled overlays and a draggable divider handle.
frontend/src/components/CareerTimeline.t: Vertical timeline component that renders a list of career milestones with year labels, dot markers on a vertical line, and event descriptions.
frontend/src/components/CommissionInquir: A form component for submitting custom artwork commission inquiries, collecting name, email, project type, budget range, and description with validation, then saving via CMSContext.
frontend/src/components/ContactForm.tsx: A simple contact form collecting name, email, and message with validation, submitting the inquiry through CMSContext and showing a confirmation on success.
frontend/src/components/FAQAccordion.tsx: An accordion component that renders a list of FAQ items, toggling one open at a time with an animated chevron indicator.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the brand name, tagline, social links, navigation, visitor/page-view stats, and an admin sign-in link, pulling data from CMSContext and analytics queries.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with a logo, desktop navigation links (active-state highlighted), and a collapsible mobile hamburger menu, driven by CMSContext navigation items.
frontend/src/components/Lightbox.tsx: A fullscreen lightbox modal for browsing artworks and their additional photos, supporting keyboard navigation, photo dot indicators, and per-artwork detail display.
A small presentational component that renders a styled italic placeholder message when information is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/NewsletterSignup: A newsletter subscription form with an email input and submit button that shows a confirmation message on successful submission.
frontend/src/components/PlaceholderImage: A lazy-loading image wrapper that renders a beige placeholder until the element is visible in the viewport, then loads the actual image.
frontend/src/components/PressMentionCard: A card component displaying a press mention with publication name, date, headline, excerpt, and an external link to the original article.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialCarou: A carousel component that displays testimonials one at a time with previous/next navigation buttons and dot indicators.
A grid component that renders all testimonials in a two-column card layout with quote, name, location, and role.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context providing simple password-based admin authentication with login, logout, and change-password functions, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx: Defines all CMS data types (Artwork, Testimonial, BlogPost, SiteSettings, etc.) and a React context/provider that exposes CRUD operations and state for the entire CMS, backed by the useCMSBackend hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCMSBackend.ts: Hook that wraps the ICP backend actor with type-conversion helpers to translate between frontend and backend data shapes for all CMS entities (artworks, testimonials, inquiries, etc.).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLazyLoad.ts: Custom hook that uses IntersectionObserver to lazily mark a referenced div element as visible once it enters the viewport.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: Hook that updates the document title and meta description tag based on per-page SEO settings retrieved from the CMS context.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageViewTracker.ts: Hook that increments the backend page view counter on mount and returns the current page view count.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for reading and mutating page view counts and unique visitor counts via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUniqueVisitorTrack: Hook that generates or retrieves a persistent visitor ID from localStorage and registers it with the backend on mount, returning the total unique visitor count.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind base/components/utilities, defines a custom design-token palette (beige, charcoal, gold, sage), and adds utility classes and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page with the artist's portrait, bio, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, Pinterest), career timeline, press mentions, and a press kit download button, pulling content from CMSContext.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminLogin.tsx: Renders a password-based admin login form with show/hide toggle, calling the AuthContext login function and displaying an error message on failure.
frontend/src/pages/admin/BlogManager.tsx: Admin page for managing blog posts, displaying a table of posts with status toggle, edit, and delete actions, and opening a BlogPostForm for creating or editing entries.
frontend/src/pages/admin/CommissionsMana: Admin page for viewing and filtering commission inquiries by status, displaying them in a table via InquiryRow components with inline status updates.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard showing summary stats (artworks, categories, inquiries, featured works) and quick-action buttons for navigating to key admin sections, plus a recent inquiries list.
Admin page for managing artworks in a sortable table with thumbnail previews, supporting add, edit, delete, featured, and visibility actions via an ArtworkForm modal.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MediaLibrary.ts: Admin media library page that supports multi-file image uploads, displays uploaded items as a filterable grid of MediaTile components searchable by filename or tag.
frontend/src/pages/admin/MessagesInbox.t: Admin page that displays contact/commission form submissions with filter tabs (all/unread/responded), expandable message rows, status updates, and two-step delete confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/PagesEditor.tsx: Admin page providing a tabbed interface to edit content for site sections: Hero, Navigation, About, Commissions, Testimonials, and Press.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Settings.tsx: Admin settings page with forms for general site config, SEO per-page metadata, social platform URLs, and a password change form with validation.
frontend/src/pages/Commissions.tsx: Renders the Commissions page featuring a hero section, numbered process steps, pricing info, a sample portfolio grid with lightbox, a commission inquiry form, and an FAQ accordion, all driven by CMSContext data.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact page with a message form, studio location display, a map placeholder, and social media links sourced from CMSContext site settings.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Renders the Gallery page with category filter tabs, a responsive artwork grid filtered by visibility and selected category, and a lightbox for full-size artwork viewing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the Home page with a full-screen hero, artist intro, featured artworks grid with lightbox, and a testimonials section, using data from CMSContext.
frontend/src/pages/Testimonials.tsx: Renders the Testimonials & Press page with a toggle between carousel and grid views for testimonials, plus a press mentions section, using data from CMSContext.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Lato), a warm beige/charcoal/gold color palette, border radius tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 35) documenting the art portfolio site's architecture, tech stack, existing features, and known issues such as broken admin auth and placeholder image rendering problems.
